name: ETH 4h Squeeze Persistence De-Risk v1
edge_mechanism: compression resolves, but entry waits for persistence after the first breakout bar and quickly de-risks if expansion does not build
thesis: ETH 4h is pure chop and therefore the best basket lane for a squeeze-follow-through test that avoids first-break hero entries. The edge is not predicting breakouts; it is entering only when a compression release proves it can persist, then removing risk quickly if that persistence never arrives.
invalidation_condition: If squeezes do not occur often enough, or if persistence confirmation remains too sparse and still fails to build expansion, the mechanism is invalid.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Volatility compresses, a breakout starts, the next bar confirms persistence, and the move either expands quickly or is reduced to low-risk failure.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Pure chop creates many false first breaks. Requiring one-bar persistence and fast de-risking is a mechanism-level way to screen those out without returning to ceremonial confirmation chains.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is the best fit because its current regime is the cleanest chop environment in the allowed basket, making fake first breaks and selective follow-through especially relevant.

indicator_role_map.ADX_14: participation gate so the move is not completely dead

pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: The setup may remain too sparse, or the persistence bar may arrive after the best part of the move is gone.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If it trades but runner expectancy is weak, keep the same trigger and shift more weight to earlier partial profit instead of relaxing compression thresholds.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Moderate count, many scratched or reduced-risk failures, and a smaller set of meaningful expansion wins.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: ETH 4h shows enough squeeze-persistence occurrences, and the de-risk rule clearly improves downside control without erasing all edge.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, sub-10 trades, or no meaningful difference between persisted releases and failed ones.

density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: moderate but broader than prior squeeze families because it trades persistence plus de-risk rather than layered ritual

test_lanes.why_included: Best chop lane in the basket for persistence-after-squeeze logic.
test_lanes.continue_if: ETH 4h shows enough squeeze releases with confirmed persistence and positive post-cost asymmetry.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: ETH 4h squeezes remain too sparse or persistence arrives too late to matter.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Moderate participation with clean de-risk behavior on false releases and occasional strong expansion runners.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the same persistence logic survives on the cycle primary lane.
test_lanes.continue_if: BTC 4h preserves squeeze-follow-through with slightly less chop noise.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: BTC 4h never enters the needed compression state often enough.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Lower count, cleaner release structure than ETH.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same idea survives on a more explosive structurally different asset.
test_lanes.continue_if: TAO 4h still shows meaningful squeeze persistence with acceptable structure.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: TAO 4h turns the mechanism into volatility chaos.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Lower count, bigger winners than ETH.

long: Enter only if next bar also closes >= EMA_20 and high exceeds prior high
short: Enter only if next bar also closes <= EMA_20 and low breaks prior low

long: De-risk to break-even if no 0.32 * ATR_14 expansion within 2 bars
short: De-risk to break-even if no 0.32 * ATR_14 expansion within 2 bars
